tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 防有鵲巢，邛有旨苕。誰侜予美，心焉忉忉。 中唐有甓，邛有旨鷊。誰侜予美，心焉惕惕。

1 On the embankment are magpies5 nests ; • On the height grows the beautiful pea. Who has been imposing on the object of my admiration ? — My heart is full of sorrow.
2 The middle path of the temple is covered with its tiles; On the height is the beautiful medallion plant. Who has been imposing on the object of my admiration? — My heart is full of trouble. ； B C. 691 — 647), who believed slan-
